content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms (like ICM and RND from Topic A) can be repurposed to prioritize which new experiences an active learning agent preserves in its long-term memory, solving the 2024-2025 SOTA challenge of scaling agent memory without catastrophic forgetting of high-value rare events. This creates a self-organizing memory hierarchy where the agent’s own innate curiosity automatically curates memory instead of relying on hard-coded retention rules.
